g.text: Directory Traversal: Three Attack Vectors Neutralized
Rule 1: URL-decode BEFORE realpath() — percent-encoding cannot hide ..
Rule 2: realpath() BEFORE prefix check — symlinks and .. both resolved
Rule 3: Check canonical[root_len] == / or NUL — /var/www/html2 cannot match /var/www/html
Rule 4: Return 403 (not 404) for out-of-root paths — never leak external filesystem layout
string prefix check would PASS: /var/www/html/secret/passwd starts with /var/www/html
naive prefix check here would PASS
